title: PTA CLOTHING CLOSET - 211info
text: BENSON POLYTECHNIC HIGH SCHOOL AT MARSHALL CAMPUS PTA CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a clothing closet for families with school-aged children. Donations accepted. 3905 SE 91st Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: Monday/Thursday 10am-1pm beginning Thursday, September 4, 2025 through Thursday, April 30, 2026 Email (503) 916-5100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 916-5100 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in to child's school office for a form. Fill out the form and bring it to the clothing closet. Drop off donations at child's school. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed form AREA SERVED: Portland Public Schools Services: Children's Clothing Clothing Donation Programs School Clothing Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
